nodes.name: 乌干达
nodes.summary: 乌干达是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联249种鸟类，包括南非鸭、Elgon francolin、Shelley's francolin等249种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Hunter's sunbird
nodes.summary: Hunter's sunbird（Chalcomitra hunteri）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Hunter's sunbird。

nodes.name: Hunter's sunbird
nodes.summary: Hunter's sunbird (Chalcomitra hunteri) is a species of bird in the family Nectariniidae. It is found in Ethiopia, Kenya, Somalia, South Sudan, Tanzania, and Uganda. References
